title: Test: Add contract testing with Pact framework
original_text: Implemented Pact contract testing for microservices. Created consumer contract specifications. Added provider contract validation. Integrated with Pact broker. Set up contract versioning and publishing. Result: Pact contract testing complete.
expected_subject: test(contract): add contract testing with Pact
expected_command: git commit -m "test(contract): add contract testing with Pact"
